title: ComfyUI – LTX Video 2.3 22B FP8 (Audio-Visual)
description: ComfyUI serverless worker with LTX Video 2.3 22B FP8. Generates synchronised video + audio from a text prompt. Includes ComfyUI-Manager, ComfyUI-LTXVideo, VideoHelperSuite and ComfyMath.

input.name: Serverless Mode
input.description: Set to 1 to run as RunPod serverless worker

input.name: Model Directory
input.description: Path where model weights are stored (use a network volume here)
